text:
STRICTLY FOR INTERNAL CIRCULATION ONLY


















USER MANUAL FOR MERCHANDISE
(TRADING) SUPPLIER REGISTRATION

(ADD DELIVERY LOCATION)

Add Delivery Location

“Merchandise Supplier” refers to Supplier of Goods procured by Reliance Retail Ltd and its
Group / Associate Companies for Trading. Articles intended for in-house consumption in
Nature and Services are not supported by this Application.
Users are allowed to add delivery location once they receive their Login credentials post the
request get approved by respective category and commercial manager
Portal link - tips://supplierregistration.oil.com/
(Click Here)

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 1: Login Screen.
1.1. Log in to the portal with user id and password.
1.2. An Email with user id and link to create password is sent to user.

1.3. Once successful login, the following page will appear.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 2: Creating New Request.
2.1. Click on “Delivery Location” and after that click on “➕Add Delivery Location”.

2.2. Fill the form with the appropriate vendor details.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 3: Selecting Location Type
3.1. Select location type from the drop-down menu shown.
3.2. Always Select Location Type as Distributor.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 4: Selecting Product Category
4.1. Below screenshot shows the available vendor categories (Under which user is
registered) in the drop-down menu.
4.2. Choose appropriate vendor category from the product category drop down list.



4.3. Choose an appropriate Store format (Under which user is registered) from the drop
down menu.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5.1. PAN is mandatory for each category.
5.2. PAN should be valid and should be in following validation.

1 Should be of 10 characters long
2 Initial 5 characters should be alphabets
3 4th character should be in [C P H F A T B L J G]
4 6th to 9th characters should be numeric
5 Last character should be alphabet

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5 Last character should be alphabet

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5.3. Title filed value will be automatically taken from the fourth character of PAN. 
C - stands for Company
P - stands for Individual
H - stands for Hindu Undivided Family (HUF)
F - stands for Firm or Limited Liability Partnership
A - stands for Association of Persons (AOP)
T - stands for Trust
B - stands for Body of Individuals (BOI)
L - stands for Local Authority
J - stands for Artificial Juridical Person
G - stands for Government Agency

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5.4.
In “NSDL PAN Name” field, type the name on the PAN card as maintained in
NSDL. Attach the PAN Document – Upload the scanned copy/E-Pan File of Vendor’s
PAN in psf or mpg format. Please declare the PAN name exactly as per PAN and ensure that “Y” flag is displayed in validation of
PAN name.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
Add Delivery Location
6 | P a g e
STRICTLY FOR INTERNAL CIRCULATION ONLY




5.5. Proof of Proprietorship – In case of Proprietorship Firm, wherein 4th Character of PAN is “P”,
and Vendor name/Bank account name is not the Proprietor’s name, Proof of proprietorship
document should be merged with copy of PAN and to be uploaded in PAN document section. List
of allowed supporting documents towards Proof of Proprietorship are hereunder:

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5.5. Proof of Proprietorship – In case of Proprietorship Firm, wherein 4th Character of PAN is “P”,
and Vendor name/Bank account name is not the Proprietor’s name, Proof of proprietorship
document should be merged with copy of PAN and to be uploaded in PAN document section. List
of allowed supporting documents towards Proof of Proprietorship are hereunder:
1. Shop & establishment certificate

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
1. Shop & establishment certificate
2. Confirmation letter from schedule Bank that Sh…. Is proprietor of M/s …. As per their
record. (RTGS mandate form is not valid here as Banks validate only signature and account no.
and do not give confirmation of other details)
3. Service tax registration certificate
4. IEC (Import export certificate) certificate
5. Trade License

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5. Trade License
6. Any other certificate issued by any Govt./Local authority showing name of both firm and
proprietor
7. UDYAM Reg. certificate
8. GST Certificate

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 6: GSTIN Details.
6.1.Basis the PAN and State code filled above, GSTIN for respective state will be fetched and plotted
in the field “GSTIN” for checking and editing (if required). If the vendor is having multiple GSTIN
for the same state, please ensure to Fill correct GSTIN no required duly supported by the GSTIN
copy.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 6: GSTIN Details.
6.2. GSTIN number should belong to the respective state (From the address section). 6.3.If vendor is GST registered then user need to upload the scanned copy of GSTIN certificate in the document field. 6.4.If vendor is not registered with GST then user need to upload No GSTIN declaration form, you can download the template for the same from download section (On top navigation bar of same page) of the portal or (Click Here).

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 6: GSTIN Details.
6.5.In case of Proprietorship Firm or Individual and if vendor is not registered with GST address proof document is also to be merged along with No GST declaration. List of supporting documents are hereunder: a. Water Bill b. Telephone (landline or postpaid mobile bill) c. Electricity bill d. Income Tax Assessment Order e. Election Commission Photo ID card f. Proof of Gas Connection g. Rent Agreement

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 6: GSTIN Details.
h. Passbook copy of Bank Account (First Page containing the Account Name, ac number, Address of account holder, etc.)

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 7: Contact Person Details.
7.1. User need to fill the details of contact person in this section. Reliance employee’s contact details
are prohibited

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
8.1. Fill UDYAM (MSME) related data in the following section.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
Add Delivery Location
8 | P a g e
STRICTLY FOR INTERNAL CIRCULATION ONLY

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
8.2. Validation rules for UDYAM (MSME) number. Should be 16 characters long Format to input as “UDYAM-XX-XX-XXXXXXX” Initial 5 characters should be UDYAM Next two characters are exactly 2 alphabetic letters (A-Z) Next two characters are exactly 2 numeric digits (0-9) Next seven characters are exactly 7 numeric digits (0-9) Each part should be separated by hyphen ( - )

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
8.3.Refer UDYAM (MSME) certificate “Date of UDYAM registration” section and select correct date from the calendar option in “Date of issue” field 8.4.Validity Year - refer latest classification date in Enterprise Type of UDYAM certificate and add correct year from the calendar in “From” field”. In “to” field mention as “9999”. You may check the current status of UDYAM number from the portal through below menu option in following link

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
tips://udyamregistration.gov.in/Udyam_Verify.asp

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
8.5. Upload the scanned copy of UDYAM (MSME) certificate in psf or mpg.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 9: FSSAI Details.
9.1. Fill FSSAI related data in the following section.
9.2. Validation rules are
FFSAI License Type
Select license type from the available options
FSSAI Number
14 digits numeric characters
Expiry Date
Enter the Expiry Date of FFSAI certificate
FSSAI Document
Upload the scanned copy of FSSAI certificate in psf/mpg format

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 9: FSSAI Details.
Add Delivery Location
9 | P a g e
STRICTLY FOR INTERNAL CIRCULATION ONLY




You may check the Active/Inactive status of FSSAI License from the portal link before entering the
details
tips://focus.fssai.gov.in/
Go to FBO search option

Type in the FSSAI number >> Enter catch>> Click on search

Detail will be displayed as below

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 10: Bank Details
10.1. Fill the correct bank details in this fields.

Account Number
Valid bank account number
IFSC Code
Valid IFSC code of the bank
Bank Name
Automatically fetched from the IFSC
Branch Name
Automatically fetched from the IFSC
Document Type
Select document type used to verify bank details
Bank Document
Upload the scanned copy of document selected in above option

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 10: Bank Details
10.1. Fill the correct bank details in this fields.

Account Number
Valid bank account number
IFSC Code
Valid IFSC code of the bank
Bank Name
Automatically fetched from the IFSC
Branch Name
Automatically fetched from the IFSC
Document Type
Select document type used to verify bank details
Bank Document
Upload the scanned copy of document selected in above option

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 10: Bank Details
10.2. User can download the template of E-payment mandate form, from the download
section (On top navigation bar of same page) of the portal or Click Here.


Note: For registering a vendor Without Bank Details, please fill Dummy Account Number as 123 and
IFSC Code: IFSC0000123.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 11: Submit the form
11.1. After filling all the required field click on submit button.
11.2. Request ID will be generated and displayed on Pop-up window. Please note the request ID for
future reference.

B. Steps to Check the Status of Vendor Registration.
Step 1: Click on the 'Status Report' tab, select 'Delivery Location' from the dropdown menu under
'Report Type', and then click 'Search.

Question: What is the Add Delivery Location process for?
Answer: The Add Delivery Location process allows registered Merchandise (Trading) Suppliers to add a delivery location for goods procured by Reliance Retail Ltd and its Group/Associate Companies. Articles meant for in-house consumption and Services are not supported by this application.

alternate_phrasings: what does add delivery location do

text:
Question: Who can add a delivery location?
Answer: Users can add a delivery location only after they receive their login credentials, which are issued once their registration request is approved by the respective Category Manager and Commercial Manager.

alternate_phrasings: can new vendors add delivery location
when can I add delivery location

text:
Question: What is the portal link?
Answer: You can access the portal at https://supplierregistration.ril.com/

Question: What are the steps to add a delivery location?
Answer: There are 11 steps: (1) Login, (2) Create New Request, (3) Select Location Type, (4) Select Product Category, (5) PAN Details, (6) GSTIN Details, (7) Contact Person Details, (8) MSME Details, (9) FSSAI Details, (10) Bank Details, and (11) Submit the Form.

alternate_phrasings: all steps in add delivery location

text:
Question: How do I get my login credentials?
Answer: After your registration is approved, an email containing your user ID and a link to create your password is sent to you. Use these credentials to log in to the portal.

Question: How do I create a new delivery location request?
Answer: After logging in, click on 'Delivery Location' and then click on 'Add Delivery Location'. Fill the form with the appropriate vendor details.

alternate_phrasings: where is add delivery location button

text:
Question: Which Location Type should I select?
Answer: Always select Location Type as 'Distributor' from the drop-down menu.

Question: How do I select Product Category and Store Format?
Answer: From the drop-down, choose the vendor category under which you are registered. Then choose the appropriate Store Format (also under which you are registered) from its drop-down menu.

Question: Is PAN mandatory?
Answer: Yes. PAN is mandatory for each category.

alternate_phrasings: is PAN required for delivery location

text:
Question: What are the PAN validation rules?
Answer: PAN must follow these rules: (1) 10 characters long, (2) First 5 characters must be alphabets, (3) 4th character must be one of C, P, H, F, A, T, B, L, J, or G, (4) 6th to 9th characters must be numeric, (5) Last character must be an alphabet.

Question: What does the 4th character of PAN mean?
Answer: The 4th character indicates the entity type: C - Company, P - Individual, H - HUF, F - Firm/LLP, A - AOP, T - Trust, B - BOI, L - Local Authority, J - Artificial Juridical Person, G - Government Agency.

alternate_phrasings: what does P or C mean in PAN

text:
Question: What should I enter in the NSDL PAN Name field?
Answer: Type the name on your PAN card exactly as maintained in NSDL. Ensure the 'Y' flag is displayed in the PAN name validation.

Question: What format should the PAN document be in?
Answer: Upload the scanned copy or E-PAN file of the vendor's PAN in PDF or JPG format.

alternate_phrasings: upload PAN as PDF or JPG

text:
Question: What documents are needed for Proof of Proprietorship?
Answer: If the 4th PAN character is 'P' and the Vendor/Bank account name differs from the Proprietor's name, merge a Proof of Proprietorship document with the PAN copy and upload in the PAN document section. Accepted documents: (1) Shop & Establishment Certificate, (2) Confirmation letter from a scheduled Bank (RTGS mandate form not valid), (3) Service Tax Registration Certificate, (4) IEC Certificate, (5) Trade License, (6) Any Govt./Local authority certificate showing both firm and proprietor name, (7) UDYAM Registration Certificate, (8) GST Certificate.

alternate_phrasings: documents when vendor name differs from proprietor

text:
Question: How is GSTIN populated?
Answer: Based on the PAN and State code you provided, the GSTIN for the respective state is automatically fetched into the GSTIN field for checking and editing if needed.

alternate_phrasings: GSTIN based on PAN and state

text:
Question: What if I have multiple GSTINs for the same state?
Answer: If you have multiple GSTINs for the same state, fill the correct GSTIN number and ensure it is supported by the GSTIN copy you upload.

alternate_phrasings: more than one GSTIN same state

text:
Question: Should GSTIN match the state address?
Answer: Yes. The GSTIN number must belong to the respective state as per the address section.

Question: What if the vendor is GST registered?
Answer: If the vendor is GST registered, upload the scanned copy of the GSTIN certificate in the document field.

Question: What if the vendor is not GST registered?
Answer: If the vendor is not GST registered, upload the 'No GSTIN Declaration' form. You can download the template from the Download section on the top navigation bar of the portal.

Question: What address proof is needed for a Proprietorship/Individual without GST?
Answer: For Proprietorship Firm or Individual vendors without GST registration, merge an address proof along with the No GST declaration. Accepted documents: (a) Water Bill, (b) Telephone bill (landline or postpaid mobile), (c) Electricity bill, (d) Income Tax Assessment Order, (e) Election Commission Photo ID card, (f) Proof of Gas Connection, (g) Rent Agreement, (h) Bank Account Passbook copy (first page with account name, number, and address).

alternate_phrasings: supporting documents for No GST declaration

text:
Question: Whose contact details should I provide?
Answer: Provide the details of your contact person. Reliance employee contact details are strictly prohibited.

alternate_phrasings: can I add Reliance employee contact

text:
Question: What is the UDYAM (MSME) number format?
Answer: Format: UDYAM-XX-XX-XXXXXXX. The document states it should be 16 characters; first 5 are 'UDYAM', next 2 are alphabetic letters (A-Z), next 2 are numeric digits (0-9), and the last 7 are numeric digits. Each part is separated by a hyphen.

Question: What date do I enter in the UDYAM Date of Issue field?
Answer: Refer to the 'Date of UDYAM Registration' section on your UDYAM (MSME) certificate and select the matching date from the calendar in the 'Date of Issue' field.

Question: How do I fill the UDYAM Validity Year fields?
Answer: In the 'From' field, enter the latest classification date from the Enterprise Type section of your UDYAM certificate. In the 'To' field, enter 9999.

Question: How can I verify my UDYAM number?
Answer: You can verify your UDYAM number status at https://udyamregistration.gov.in/Udyam_Verify.aspx

Question: What format should the UDYAM certificate be uploaded in?
Answer: Upload the scanned copy of the UDYAM (MSME) certificate in PDF or JPG format.

Question: How do I fill FSSAI details?
Answer: Fill these FSSAI fields: License Type (select from available options), FSSAI Number (must be 14 numeric digits), Expiry Date (enter the certificate's expiry date), and FSSAI Document (upload scanned copy in PDF/JPG format).

Question: How can I check the Active/Inactive status of my FSSAI license?
Answer: You can check the Active/Inactive status of your FSSAI license at https://foscos.fssai.gov.in/ - go to the FBO search option, enter the FSSAI number, enter the captcha, and click Search.

Question: What bank details do I need to enter?
Answer: Enter: Account Number (valid bank account number), IFSC Code (valid IFSC), Bank Name (auto-fetched from IFSC), Branch Name (auto-fetched from IFSC), Document Type (select used for bank verification), and Bank Document (upload scanned copy of the selected document).

Question: Can I register a vendor without bank details?
Answer: Yes. To register a vendor without bank details, fill Account Number as '123' and IFSC Code as 'IFSC0000123' as dummy values.

Question: Where can I download the E-payment mandate form?
Answer: You can download the E-payment mandate form template from the Download section on the top navigation bar of the portal.

Question: How do I submit the request?
Answer: After filling all required fields, click the Submit button. A Request ID will be generated and displayed in a pop-up window. Please note this Request ID for future reference.

Question: How do I check the status of my delivery location request?
Answer: Click on the 'Status Report' tab, select 'Delivery Location' from the dropdown under 'Report Type', and click 'Search'. The status of your vendor registration will be displayed.

Question: What is the TAT for approval?
Answer: Once the Request ID is generated, the turnaround time (TAT) for approval is 24 to 48 hours.

Question: Who do I contact for login or technical issues?
Answer: For any login-related or technical issues, contact rrsrportal@ril.com

Question: What is this portal for?
Answer: The Supplier Registration Portal is used for onboarding new Merchandise (Trading) Vendors with Reliance Retail.

alternate_phrasings: what does the supplier registration portal do

text:
Question: What is the link to the supplier registration portal?
Answer: You can access the portal at https://supplierregistration.ril.com/

alternate_phrasings: where do I register as a supplier

text:
Question: How do I start a new supplier registration?
Answer: Visit https://supplierregistration.ril.com/ and click the 'New Supplier Registration' button on the right side panel of the page.

alternate_phrasings: where to click for new registration

text:
Question: How many steps are there in the registration process?
Answer: There are 7 steps: (1) Visit Portal Page, (2) Supplier PAN Details, (3) Office Address Details, (4) Contact Details, (5) Select Product Category and Format, (6) Accept Terms and Conditions, and (7) Request ID Generation.

Question: What are the validation rules for PAN?
Answer: Your PAN must follow these rules: (1) Must be exactly 10 characters long, (2) First 5 characters must be alphabets, (3) 4th character must be one of C, P, H, F, A, T, B, L, J, or G, (4) 6th to 9th characters must be numeric, (5) Last character must be an alphabet.

Question: What does the 4th character of my PAN signify?
Answer: The 4th character indicates the entity type: C - Company, P - Individual, H - Hindu Undivided Family (HUF), F - Firm or Limited Liability Partnership, A - Association of Persons (AOP), T - Trust, B - Body of Individuals (BOI), L - Local Authority, J - Artificial Juridical Person, G - Government Agency.

alternate_phrasings: what does P in PAN mean
what does C in PAN mean

text:
Question: The Title field is blank after entering my PAN. What should I do?
Answer: The Title field is auto-populated from the 4th character of your PAN. If it doesn't populate, remove the PAN and retype it.

alternate_phrasings: PAN entered but title is missing

text:
Question: How should I declare my PAN name?
Answer: Declare the PAN name exactly as per your PAN card. Ensure the 'Y' flag is displayed in the PAN name validation.

alternate_phrasings: how to write name as per PAN

text:
Question: What file format is accepted for the PAN document upload?
Answer: Upload a scanned copy or E-PAN file in PDF or JPG format.

alternate_phrasings: can I upload JPG for PAN

text:
Question: I am a Proprietorship Firm. What additional document do I need?
Answer: If your 4th PAN character is 'P' and your Vendor name/Bank account name differs from the Proprietor's name, you must merge a Proof of Proprietorship document with your PAN copy. Accepted documents are: (1) Shop & Establishment Certificate, (2) Confirmation letter from a scheduled Bank stating proprietorship, (3) Service Tax Registration Certificate, (4) IEC (Import Export Certificate), (5) Trade License, (6) Any Govt./Local authority certificate showing both firm and proprietor name, (7) UDYAM Registration Certificate, (8) GST Certificate.

alternate_phrasings: PAN with P 4th character what documents

text:
Question: Is the RTGS mandate form valid as proof of proprietorship?
Answer: No. The RTGS mandate form is not accepted. Banks only validate signature and account number on it and do not confirm other details. Please use one of the other accepted proof documents.

alternate_phrasings: can I use RTGS form as proof

text:
Question: I am a farmer. How do I declare this?
Answer: Click 'Yes' on the farmer option and attach a supporting document to establish your status as a farmer.

Question: What is the format for the UDYAM (MSME) number?
Answer: The UDYAM number must follow this format: UDYAM-XX-XX-XXXXXXX. It is 19 characters long. First 5 characters: 'UDYAM'. Next 2: alphabetic letters (A-Z) for state. Next 2: numeric digits for district code. Last 7: numeric digits unique to the enterprise. Each part is separated by a hyphen.

Question: Where do I find the Date of Issue for UDYAM?
Answer: Refer to the 'Date of UDYAM Registration' section on your UDYAM (MSME) certificate and select the matching date from the calendar in the 'Date of Issue' field.

alternate_phrasings: which date to enter for UDYAM

text:
Question: What should I enter in the Validity Year From and To fields?
Answer: In the 'From' field, enter the latest classification date from the Enterprise Type section of your UDYAM certificate. In the 'To' field, enter 9999.

Question: How can I verify my UDYAM number?
Answer: You can verify it at https://udyamregistration.gov.in/Udyam_Verify.aspx

Question: In what format should I upload the UDYAM certificate?
Answer: Upload the scanned copy of the UDYAM (MSME) certificate in PDF or JPG format.

Question: What address should I provide in the Office Address section?
Answer: Provide your Supplier Address (Registered Office Address) details and click Next.

Question: How do I verify my mobile number?
Answer: Enter your mobile number and click the 'Get OTP' button. You will receive an OTP for verification.

Question: Can I use a Reliance employee's contact details?
Answer: No. Reliance employee contact details are strictly prohibited in the registration.

Question: How do I select the correct product category and format?
Answer: Choose the appropriate category and format from the dropdowns. Please seek guidance from the Reliance Buyer you are coordinating with to ensure the correct selection.

Question: Can I select multiple product categories?
Answer: Yes. After selecting a category and format, click 'Add Product Category' on the right side. You may add more than one category and format.

Question: When are FSSAI details required?
Answer: The system will prompt for FSSAI details if applicable based on your selected category. You can also add multiple FSSAI license entries.

Question: How do I complete the registration?
Answer: Read the terms and conditions, check the 'I accept terms and conditions' box, and click the 'Register' button.

Question: What happens after I submit the registration?
Answer: A Request ID will be generated and assigned for future reference. A notification email will also be sent to your registered email and to the Business team for further processing.

Question: How can I check my registration status?
Answer: Click on the 'Check Registration Status' option on the portal, enter your PAN in the search window, and click 'Search' to view your business approval status.

Question: Should I check my status before re-registering?
Answer: Yes. Always check your registration status through the 'Check Registration Status' option before initiating a fresh registration.

Question: What happens once my request is approved?
Answer: Once approved by the Category and Commercial Managers, login credentials will be sent to your registered email via an auto-generated email. Click the link in the Activation Email, set your password, and submit.
